h1: The 2026 Manufacturing Shifts You Can’t Ignore

headings.text: The 2026 Manufacturing Shifts You Can’t Ignore

meta_description: Manufacturing is at an inflection point. To stay competitive, you must move beyond reaction to proactive strategy. Join us for an exclusive deep dive into the 2026 State of Manufacturing & Supply Chain Report. We have distilled insights from over 300 industry leaders into a practical playbook for the year ahead. We aren’t just discussing
text_excerpt: The 2026 Manufacturing Shifts You Can’t Ignore - Fictiv Fictiv named Sourcing Solution of the Year at the SupplyTech Breakthrough Awards → Learn More Fictiv named Sourcing Solution of the Year at the SupplyTech Breakthrough Awards → Learn More x Capabilities Capabilities CNC Machining Tight tolerances and finishing capabilities, manufactured in one day. Sheet Metal Experience the versatility & cost efficiency with flexible application options. Injection Molding Production-grade steel tooling, as fast as weeks. Die Casting Create high quality custom mechanicals with precision and accuracy. 3D Printing FDM, SLS, SLA, PolyJet, MJF technologies. Compression Molding Experience lower tooling costs with high-quality durable parts. Urethane Casting Production quality parts without the tooling investment. title: The 2026 Manufacturing Shifts You Can’t Ignore - Fictiv
